metadata.title: UK Lobbying & Ministerial Transparency
metadata.description: Data from the Office of the Registrar of Consultant Lobbyists (ORCL) statutory register, quarterly information returns, and GOV.UK ministerial transparency releases.

primarySources.name: Office of the Registrar of Consultant Lobbyists (ORCL)
primarySources.notes: Statutory register under the Transparency of Lobbying Act 2014. Covers consultant (third-party) lobbyists only. Current register downloaded April 2026. Quarterly returns data from Q4 2025 (Oct-Dec).

primarySources.name: ORCL Quarterly Information Returns
primarySources.notes: Quarterly client data published by ORCL. Latest: Q4 2025 (October-December 2025), published 1 February 2026.

primarySources.name: GOV.UK Ministerial Transparency Releases
primarySources.notes: 27+ departments publish quarterly transparency data. Cabinet Office centralised register from July 2024 (monthly).

primarySources.name: Transparency International UK — Open Access
primarySources.notes: Harmonised 60,000+ ministerial meetings from 27 departments (2012 onwards).

registerLimitations: Covers consultant lobbyists only — NOT in-house lobbyists
Records client names only — not the subject or official lobbied
No disclosure of lobbying expenditure or contract values
No disclosure of specific communications or meetings
Estimated to cover less than 1% of total UK lobbying activity

contextSentences.headline: The UK lobbying register covers just 251 consultant lobbyists representing 1,172 clients — estimated to capture less than 1% of total lobbying activity.
contextSentences.growth: 35 new firms registered in 2025, the highest single-year growth since the register was established in 2015.
contextSentences.clients: In Q4 2025 alone, registered lobbyists declared 1,221 client relationships — Policy Connect Ltd leads with 94 clients.
contextSentences.comparison: The US lobbying register covers 12,000 entities and requires disclosure of spending and subjects. The UK register covers 251 and discloses neither.
contextSentences.meetings: Over 60,000 ministerial meetings with external organisations have been published since 2012, across 27 government departments.
